prompts.WO-BORROWED-NOSTALGIA: Square product photograph. A small cream-linen envelope sealed with a cobalt wax circle, resting on aged cream paper beside a single pressed dried flower and a folded handwritten letter, all on a warm putty linen surface. Hard side-lighting from the left casts a clean geometric shadow. Scarlet, cobalt, and butter accents. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-BOTTLED-MORNING: Square product photograph. A squat amber glass bottle with a ground-glass stopper sits on a cream card stock sheet. A small cobalt circle of paper and a butter-yellow square card are arranged beside it. Morning directional light from upper-left, sharp shadow geometry on linen surface. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-CHAOS-SEASONING: Square product photograph. A small matte ceramic jar with a tight-fitting lid sits open, fine pale powder dusted around its base on cream paper. A cobalt triangle card and a scarlet circle of sealing wax nearby. Hard overhead studio light, linen background, Bauhaus palette. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-COSMIC-MYSTERY-BOX: Square product photograph. A compact square rigid box wrapped in deep cobalt paper, closed with a butter-yellow linen ribbon tied in a flat bow. Resting on cream cartridge paper, one small scarlet circle sticker on the lid corner. Studio light from upper-right, crisp shadow. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-DEJA-VU-SESSION: Square product photograph. A cream moleskine-style notebook open to a blank spread, a short black pencil resting diagonally across the gutter. Beside it a cobalt circle of wax and a scarlet triangular paper flag bookmark. Warm directional light, linen tabletop, geometric shadows. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-DISCOUNT-GRAVITY: Square product photograph. A small spherical cream paperweight with a flat base, tilted slightly on a butter-yellow card square atop a cream linen surface. A cobalt ink bottle cap and a scarlet rubber band beside it. Hard angled light from the left, clean shadows. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-DREAD-REPELLENT: Square product photograph. A slim matte black glass atomizer bottle with a cream rubber bulb atomizer, standing upright on a cream card sheet. A cobalt square tile and a scarlet circle cut from card stock arranged around the base. Studio light casting sharp geometric shadow on linen. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-FOG-IN-BOTTLE: Square product photograph. A tall clear glass apothecary bottle sealed with a cork stopper, interior surface fogged with condensation, resting on cream cartridge paper. Cobalt and scarlet geometric card pieces flanking it. Diffused side-light from the left, linen surface, minimal. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-FORBIDDEN-HONEY: Square product photograph. A small hexagonal glass jar of deep amber honey, lid sealed with a scarlet wax circle, sitting on a cream linen cloth. A butter-yellow square card and a cobalt ink dropper beside it. Hard directional studio light from upper-left. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-GENTLY-USED-LUCK: Square product photograph. A single aged brass coin with a worn face resting inside a small cream paper envelope left open, a cobalt wax seal on the flap. A scarlet square card and butter-yellow triangle of paper alongside on linen. Warm raking light, deep shadows. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-HANDCRAFTED-ECHO: Square product photograph. A small cream ceramic bowl with a smooth interior, a single coiled strip of cream paper inside it, cobalt and scarlet geometric paper cut-outs scattered around on linen. Studio light from upper-right, precise shadow geometry. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-HAUNTED-CANDLE: Square product photograph. A thick cylindrical cream beeswax candle with a burned wick, standing on a cobalt square tile. Drips of solidified wax on the tile. A scarlet circle wax seal and a butter-yellow card strip beside it on cream paper surface. Side-light, deep shadows. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-IMAGINARY-DEED: Square product photograph. A folded cream heavyweight paper document, accordion-folded and bound with a scarlet linen ribbon, resting flat on a linen surface. A cobalt ink stamp pad and a brass seal press beside it. Hard directional light from upper-left. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-INTERDIM-BAZAAR: Square product photograph. A small flat cream wooden tray holding five miniature objects: a brass ring, a cobalt glass bead, a scarlet wax chip, a butter-yellow square tile, a tiny white card. Studio light overhead, linen background, clean geometric shadows. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-INVISIBLE-UMBRELLA: Square product photograph. A closed miniature cream fabric parasol with a turned-wood handle, lying on its side on cream cartridge paper. A cobalt circle card and scarlet triangle card propped against it. Warm directional light from left, geometric shadow. No text, no logos.
prompts.WO-LEFT-SOCK: Square product photograph. A single hand-knitted cream wool sock folded in thirds on a cream paper sheet, a scarlet and cobalt geometric paper band wrapped around its middle.
